value.rationale: This offering describes configurable permission modes (request-review, proceed-in-sandbox, strict) that control how autonomously a Google agent executes work. This is a slice of the guardrails-safety capability — specifically structured permission/autonomy-level controls. The closest parent is the artifact-review-policy feature under google-antigravity-2-0-guardrails-safety, which covers request-review and always-proceed policies, and the strict-mode feature also maps directly. It is a partial coverage of guardrails-safety as it focuses only on the permission mode configuration aspect.
